info.Completion: Approach the Damsel, complete the mission and accept the next one remotely, go to the next Agent.
info.Tip: There are no Hostiles at the location, so you could use a Shuttle, but since the next mission Agent is in another location and involves combat, it is best to bring your ship to avoid going back for it.

info.Objective: Report to Agent Tevis Jak in Tar.

info.Blitz: Kill the first spawn of Hostiles, loot the Datacore and bring it back to the agent.

info.Objective: Kill the first spawn, loot the "Red" and bring it back to the agent.
Report to Sister Alitura As requested.
Engage hostiles and retrieve the Janitor from his shuttle.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn
lines: Yeah, I know where Aubrei (the ship's cook) was headed, but I'll need a terminal to give you the coordinates. A terminal in a safe station. I'm not stupid.
Give me a moment to input Nebben's data. He's already providing us with good information.

info.Objective: Find and retrieve Chef Aubrei Azil and bring him to Sister Alitura.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Hey, could you give me a hand, here? The damn things took out my propulsion; I'm dead in the water!

pockets.heading: Single Spawn
lines: Rogue drones? Hmm. Well bring Azil back here and we'll see what we can do for hiura.

info.Objective: Deliver A Lot of Money ransom to the drop location to have Doctor Luija Elban released.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: That worked out well. I wonder how much cash we can get if we kill you and keep the doctor?
Engage the enemy to force them to release the Hostage.

info.Objective: Rescue Engineer Tahaki Karin from her ship, The Heartbreak.
info.Blitz: Loot the Engineer from the container, return to Sister Alitura.

pockets.heading: Single Pocket
lines: Get me out of here! This thing might explode any second now!
Looting the Engineer triggers an Hostile spawn.

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn
lines: Excellent. Karin is being transported to a more secure Sisters of EVE location for a full debriefing with our people. Don't worry, we'll keep Concord well informed of our progress.
Blitz: Loot the Engineer from the container, return to Sister Alitura.

info.Objective: Report to Agent Delphine Xarasier in Harerget.
Retrieve the Corrupted Drone Components and return them to the agent.
info.Blitz: Loot the objective from the container, return it to the Agent.

1- 2x Rogue Drone Frigate (Infester Alvi, aka Broken Duvolle Labaratories Recon Drone)
Blitz: Loot the objective from the container, return it to the Agent.

Clear the area of Serpentis Pirates and ambush the Personnel Transport.
Retrieve Dr. Castille's Data Core from the Destroyed Ship (35km) and bring it to Agent Delphine.

lines: 6x Frigate (Gistii Gistii Nomad/ Outlaw/ Ruffian/ Thug)

Scout out the drone hive and report back on friendly vessels.

lines: Blitz: Approach the Drone Hive (75km), to about 25km for the mission objective to update, return to the Agent.

Kill the Mercenaries protecting the Guristas facility, then report back to Immuri Asaka.
Drop the Farming Supplies to the Storage Warehouse.

pockets.heading: Support Fleet (Blue)
lines: Blitz: Drop the item and return to the Agent.

info.Objective: Neutralize every Drone inside the quarantine area.

pockets.heading: Support Fleet (Blue)
lines: Nice flying pilot. That's the last of the drones taken care of. Feel free to inspect the wreckage if you like but I just received an official transmission for you from the Sisters of Eve. Looks like they've got a new lead for you to chase up anyways.

info.Objective: Report to Sister Alitura.
Evacuate the FR Personnel from the area (Habitation Module - Personal Quarters, 81km). You might get surprised by Rogue Drones. Stay on task, though.
info.Blitz: Burn to the container, loot, return to base.

pockets.heading: Right Group (69- 88km, Hollow Asteroid)
lines: Blitz: Burn to the container, loot, return to base.
Bless you for saving those people. I know you didn't do this out of charity, but your help is appreciated anyway. You have been paid, but when you're ready, I have another lead on this drone.

info.Objective: Transport the Encoded Data Transmission to agent.
Track the drone with the help of Wolf Burgan.
info.Blitz: Burn to the Wrecked Ship (40km), loot Corin Risa and return to Sister Alitura.

pockets.heading: Part 1
lines: Go to Mordu's outpost and extract Corin Risa. He's afraid for his life, so expect anything.
Objective: Get the Scope reporter out of Mordu's Legion space and destroy his captors.
Mission and Space type: Encounter, Deadspace

pockets.heading: 1st Spawn (58- 60km, Right Flank)
lines: Looting Corin Risa triggers the spawn. Auto aggro.

pockets.heading: 2nd Spawn (55- 58km, Left Flank)
lines: Blitz: Burn to the Wrecked Ship (40km), loot Corin Risa and return to Sister Alitura.
Risia said to thank you for the lift.

pockets.heading: Part 2
lines: That was close. At least Corin's out of danger for the moment. We really want the tracking data for this drone. Luckily, he hid the data in a secure place. Can I trust you to take him to his hideout in a nearby station so he can transfer the data? Buying and selling information takes time, you know?
to CBD Corporation Station in Attyn.

pockets.heading: Part 3
lines: Now that we have the data, we can deliver it to a more secure, untraceable Sisters of EVE location. If you could take the data to Arnon, I'd appreciate it. Don't worry, this is completely safe; you'll be fine.
to the Delivery Jetcan (31km), and return to me after the job is done.
Mission and Space type: Encounter, Deadspace

Doesn't this seem odd to you? All these clandestine machinations for a single drone? I've sold more important information to seedier clients, and right in front of a Concord Station, no less. There's more to this whole deal than they're letting on.
There's the Capsuleer who took Risia from us! Get him!

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (14- 19km)
lines: Before we get the Mercenary's help, we need to get him out of a jam. This guy goes by the name “Wolf Burgan”. Yeah, it's stupid, but I'm willing to cut him slack because he's a damn good tracker. Wolf's been all over the universe and hunted damn near everything at some point.

You don't get that good without making a few enemies. Right now the Serpentis want his head in a bad way. Wolf may be a great captain, but he's not a Capsuleer. If he croaks, there's no resurrection. The Serpentis know it.

pockets.heading: Part 1 Planting the Body
lines: We're going to use this to our advantage. Thanks to a previous indictment, the local law at a nearby station has a sample of Wolf's DNA. You should have no trouble getting access to it just by virtue of being a Capsuleer. Bring me Wolf's DNA sample, and I can hatch my crazy scheme.
at Poteque Pharmaceuticals Biotech Production in Attyn and transport it back to Sister Alitura.
Let me just rush this over to the medlab... there. The body should be here in a minute.

pockets.heading: Part 2
lines: Yes, the body's done. I had the techs at the cloning lab imprint Wolf Burgan's DNA on one of their blank slabs of biomass. If you were to take a tissue sample, it would come back as one hundred percent Wolf Burgan. Of course, the slab is completely inert and only vaguely human-shaped, but that won't be a problem once we blow it up.

There's a small outpost in Arnon, and the Serpentis are convinced that Wolf is hiding out there. Take the body and fly it to the outpost. Kill the Serpentis if you feel like it. You're going to place the fake body in the outpost, then fly away. This will activate the timed explosives Burgan planted.
To any observer it should look like you swooped in and took out Burgan yourself, and the charred body with his DNA should sell it.
Objective: Plant the fake body in the Outpost (Wolf Burgan Hideout, 27km). Any Serpentis kills are optional.
Mission and Space type: Encounter, Deadspace

pockets.heading: Part 3 Chasing a Nightmare
lines: We've secured Wolf Burgan's aid. Now all you need to do is fly out to a few of the hot spots where the drone has been spotted. Burgan's staying behind, but he'll be connected to your systems remotely. He'll update you as the situation changes. Listen to what he says. Wolf will point you in the right direction.
Objective: Track the drone with the help of Wolf Burgan.
Mission and Space type: Encounter, Deadspace

pockets.heading: Warp In Location
lines: No Hostiles at location, the acceleration gate to the next pocket is at 25km.
Well, it looks like we missed the party. Something was here, but it's faint. Take that acceleration gate.
Another graveyard. Did that just-? How did it do that? What are you sitting there for, follow it!

pockets.heading: Multiple Pockets
lines: 1st Spatial Rift is at 15km. 2nd Spatial Rift is at 25km. 3rd Spatial Rift is at 14km.

pockets.heading: Single Hostile
lines: I've lost the signal. Whatever that thing is, it's hightailed it out of there. That's okay. I've got enough data here I know how to track it. With this we should be able to pin point its exact location. Come on back.
You followed it through a spatial rift of some sort? They aren't supposed to be able to do that... Drones, I mean. Now, your next mission.

info.Objective: Hunt down and remove all drones in the area.
info.Blitz: The gates are not locked you may warp through.

info.Faction: Angel Cartel, Sansha Nation and Serpentis

pockets.heading: Lone Minmatar Republic Capital Ship
lines: Looks like they're still getting reinforcements. They even have a stolen Nidhoggur. Alright, I have all the information I need, good work. Getback to me before they realize you're there and we can discuss what comes next.
Blitz: Warp to beacon, receive message and return.

info.Objective: Report to Tarak Erand at the Brutor Tribe Academy Station in Lustrevik.
Take out the Auxiliary Power Array (45km).

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (5- 15km)
lines: My men finished cleaning up the remaining hostiles just a few moments ago. You'll be pleased to hear this though.

We caught someone trying to flee the scene; we think he knows something about the guys running this whole operation. He's been taken into questioning. If he does know anything, we'll have the information ourselves very shortly.

info.Objective: Clear the facility of hostiles and capture any of the Lieutenants present.

pockets.heading: Single Group (22- 25km)
lines: We were scanning the radio chatter of those guys you took out. They were trying to evacuate someone from that Habitation Module. It's vulnerable now without them guarding it, so you can fire a few rounds off into the building. That should flush him out.
Lieutenant Kirus: Alright, alright! Stop shooting, I'll come with you!
Structures: the Habitation Module drops some commodities. Oxygen(10), Wheat(10), Dairy Products(10).
Good work. I had a feeling we'd find at least one of them there. We'll take him out back and encourage him to talk.

info.Objective: Report to Keita Eslin at the Krusual Tribe Bureau Station in Hek.
Assassinate Izia Tabar.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (15- 18km)
lines: You have done exceptionally well. Our teams will head over to Tabar's compound now and comb the area for further evidence. Get back to me when you are ready for one last assignment. It is about time the Minmatar repaid you for all you've done, and I have some information about how we can make that happen.

info.Objective: Run interference for the Krusual spy in Tabar's training compound.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (23- 25km)
lines: You've destroyed a pirate ring that would have taken us months to work through. High marks all around.

info.Objective: Report to Dovirch Anselm at Ammatar Consulate Bureau Station in Tanoo.
Bring Mizara's Doll (1.0 m3) to the colony where her family lives.
Report to Doctor Canius at the Theology Council Tribunal Station in Lisudeh.
Recover an artifact from the dig site using an archeology module like the one provided.
info.Tip: Fit the Civilian Relic Analyser provided.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (26- 32km)
lines: Tip: Fit the Civilian Relic Analyser provided.

Blood Raiders? You're lucky you lived. They're psychotic and bloodthirsty, literally. Their sect believes purity can only be reached by consumin' blood, and clone blood is the purest of all. I'm afraid that makes you Capsuleers their favorite snack.
But you're alive, and you've got the artifact, so we're good.

info.Objective: Find the Monastery. Clear the area of any pirates. Retrieve any documents you find.
info.Tip: Don't forget to loot the Strange Coded Document.

pockets.heading: Scavenger Group (22- 50km, Amarr Holy Dome)

2x Caldari Frigate (Independent Griffin or Kestrel/ Green-Crewed Condor)
2x Gallente Frigate (Independent Incursus/ Green-Crewed Maulus or Atron)
2x Minmatar Frigate (Independent Probe o Vigil/ Green-Crewed Rifter or Breacher)
Tip: Don't forget to loot the Strange Coded Document.

Good job cleanin' those guys out. I wouldn't worry about the ramifications of slaughterin' some godless scavengers. The first rule of any good reclaimin' is it's about souls, not bodies. You just happen to have a lot of the latter left over.
Now, let's have a look at that document you found.

info.Objective: Report to Dovirch Anselm at the Ammatar Consulate Bureau Station in Tanoo.
Defeat Taphos in a Trial by Combat.

pockets.heading: Lone Ship (16km)
lines: It is done, then. I've already started making my calls. As far as the media is concerned, he accused you of contract fraud, but God proved your innocence through a lawful trial by combat.
This mission may be completed remotely.

info.Objective: Report to Sister Alitura at Sisters of EVE Bureau Station in Arnon.

Destroy the Society spy.

pockets.heading: Society Escort Fleet (10- 26km)

I am Adani Yusev from Ishukone Internal Security. We've been monitoring data traffic between you and the Servant Sisters of Eve. No, don't get excited. We're all on the same side, here. The State will help you get Dagan... as long as you hand him over to us once you've got him.
Excellent work. The Omnipresence has been destroyed, and there's no indication that she managed to inform her Society masters. We'll be resuming contact with Karin immediately.

info.Objective: Eliminate the squadron and bring Kritsan Parthus back for interrogation.

pockets.heading: Single Spawn (7- 11km)
lines: That's an Amarr citizen you've kidnapped, pilot. But if I understand your motives correctly, we can overlook that. Once you've extracted Dagan's location, we'll help you bring the hammer of God down on that bastard.
I'll handle questioning Parthus. Rest assured, he will be treated humanely, and compensated well.

pockets.heading: Second Room
lines: All the ships from the first room will come through in their groups and engage you. Each group is triggered as you get closer to the Caldari Bunker that contains the objective.

Blitz (tanky): Kill Eroma Eralen, loot the overlay transponder. Fly through the first room and in the second burn towards the bunker and pop the forcefield (>150 DPS required) and bunker, then loot the objective. You will be tanking all the spawns at once so this is only recommended in a semi-tanky ship.

Blitz (ninja): Kill Eroma Eralen, loot the overlay transponder. Fit a weapon with +15k range and a tractor beam (or two). Kite the blob of rats away from the forcefield bubble. Burn around them and back to the bunker. Destroy the bunker and tractor the containers out of the forcefield. There will probably be two, one with ammo, the other with the mission item.
This ends the arc for the Kori Path, reward is listed at the bottom.
